title: Build and Ship an Authorized Web Crawler and Accessible Site Auditor in Go 1.26
description: Advanced Go backend and web learners ready to integrate authorization, web standards, net/http ownership, bounded goroutine scheduling, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, accessibility auditing, secure reporting, native testing, deployment, and recovery into one cumulative crawler product. This original, research-backed path uses repeated retrieval, cumulative artifacts, changed-case labs, stakeholder projects, and a performance exam.
outcomes: Demonstrate a cumulative crawler and accessible site auditor from explicit owner authorization through url and robots policy, bounded net/http retrieval, goquery extraction, race-safe frontiers, per-origin goroutine scheduling, colly adoption, durable checkpoints, site-quality audits, safe reports, native tests, operations, and recovery through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate go 1.26.5 source-to-binary proof; rfc 9309; sitemaps; net/url; net/http; net/netip; x/net/html 0.57; goquery 1.12; colly 2.3; robotstxt 1.1; concurrency, security, accessibility, privacy, testing, deployment, and incident evidence through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate original deterministic browser models plus controlled compiler, httptest, dns, filesystem, parser, race, fuzz, colly, browser service, accessibility, load, binary, container, restore, rollback, legal-review, and production transfer gates through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate five distinct stakeholder projects and a cumulative unfamiliar-site production defense through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
sharedRequirements: Every activity retrieves stakeholder outcome, owner permission, revision and Go version, seed and URL key, origin and path policy, robots and sitemap evidence, request and response budgets, parser and record provenance, frontier and goroutine ownership, privacy and accessibility requirement, failure, cleanup, recovery, and controlled transfer limit before adding one boundary.

Browser Go uses original fixed fixtures and pure bounded models only. It does not open sockets, resolve DNS, import native parser or crawler packages, read host files, retain credentials, launch processes or unbounded goroutines, or claim live accessibility, privacy, legal, race, load, binary, container, restore, or production behavior.

Passing work requires prediction, exact intermediate evidence, compile-ready accepted and rejected cases, a changed case, a test that catches a deliberate defect, accessible stakeholder output, count reconciliation, and explicit ownership of remaining risk.

competencies.statement: Define stakeholder, affected users, decision, page population, acceptable delay, success, failure harm, and observable value.
misconceptions: Collecting more pages automatically creates more stakeholder value.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define stakeholder, affected users, decision, page population, acceptable delay, success, failure harm, and observable value.

masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bound frontier, workers, open bodies, parser memory, report buffers, files, and browser-service requests with end-to-end backpressure.

competencies.statement: Assign channel creation, senders, receiver, closer, buffering rationale, and cancellation behavior without double close or blocked send.
misconceptions: Any goroutine that notices completion may close a shared channel.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Assign channel creation, senders, receiver, closer, buffering rationale, and cancellation behavior without double close or blocked send.

competencies.statement: Derive owner, run, item, attempt, deadline, and shutdown contexts and preserve the first meaningful cancellation cause.
misconceptions: Passing context.Background through all functions enables cancellation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Derive owner, run, item, attempt, deadline, and shutdown contexts and preserve the first meaningful cancellation cause.

competencies.statement: Collect per-item outcomes without abandoning siblings, leaking goroutines, hiding first cause, or converting policy stops into errors.
misconceptions: Returning the first worker error safely ends the pool.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Collect per-item outcomes without abandoning siblings, leaking goroutines, hiding first cause, or converting policy stops into errors.

competencies.statement: Stop admission, cancel permitted operations, close by owner, await goroutines, flush durable state, close transports, and prove no leak.
misconceptions: Exiting main cleans goroutines and network resources gracefully.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Stop admission, cancel permitted operations, close by owner, await goroutines, flush durable state, close transports, and prove no leak.

competencies.statement: Map Collector creation, callback registration, Visit, Request, Async, Wait, error, and close-related ownership into the application lifecycle.
misconceptions: Setting Async true automatically waits for all callbacks.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Map Collector creation, callback registration, Visit, Request, Async, Wait, error, and close-related ownership into the application lifecycle.

competencies.statement: Translate allowed domains, depth, body size, redirects, robots, rate limits, revisit, and user agent from owned policy and verify gaps.
misconceptions: Colly defaults necessarily match the course crawl charter.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Translate allowed domains, depth, body size, redirects, robots, rate limits, revisit, and user agent from owned policy and verify gaps.

competencies.statement: Keep callbacks thin, order-independent where required, concurrency-safe, context-rich, and delegated to testable application services.
misconceptions: Callback registration order defines a safe business transaction.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Keep callbacks thin, order-independent where required, concurrency-safe, context-rich, and delegated to testable application services.

competencies.statement: Choose memory or persistent visited and cookie storage from scale, privacy, crash, tenant, and cleanup requirements.
misconceptions: Persistent Colly storage can be shared across all runs safely.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose memory or persistent visited and cookie storage from scale, privacy, crash, tenant, and cleanup requirements.

competencies.statement: Run equivalent fixtures through the owned engine and Colly adapter, reconcile requests and records, and document accepted differences.
misconceptions: Framework adoption removes need for lower-level invariant tests.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Run equivalent fixtures through the owned engine and Colly adapter, reconcile requests and records, and document accepted differences.

competencies.statement: Choose policy, seed, frontier, attempts, digests, records, reports, and counters that must survive versus recomputable state.
misconceptions: Serializing every Go object is the most reliable checkpoint.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose policy, seed, frontier, attempts, digests, records, reports, and counters that must survive versus recomputable state.

competencies.statement: Use explicit portable schema, size limits, checksums, compatibility rules, and unknown-field policy rather than implicit struct layout.
misconceptions: gob files remain stable across every code and type change.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use explicit portable schema, size limits, checksums, compatibility rules, and unknown-field policy rather than implicit struct layout.

competencies.statement: Write temporary state, flush and sync under declared durability, validate, rename atomically, sync directory where required, and retain fallback.
misconceptions: os.Rename alone guarantees durable valid state after power loss.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Write temporary state, flush and sync under declared durability, validate, rename atomically, sync directory where required, and retain fallback.

competencies.statement: Recover claimed and fetching items into bounded retry or review states using attempt and idempotency evidence.
misconceptions: Marking in-flight work complete avoids duplicate requests safely.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Recover claimed and fetching items into bounded retry or review states using attempt and idempotency evidence.

competencies.statement: Load and reconcile checkpoints without network effects, require current authorization, then prove no lost or duplicated state before restart.
misconceptions: Successful decoding is sufficient resume validation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Load and reconcile checkpoints without network effects, require current authorization, then prove no lost or duplicated state before restart.

competencies.statement: Label raw, decoded, DOM, selected-content, record, and rendered digests with algorithm and transformation version.
misconceptions: One hash identifies content across every representation stage.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Label raw, decoded, DOM, selected-content, record, and rendered digests with algorithm and transformation version.

competencies.statement: Distinguish URL alias, byte identity, admitted-record equality, replay, and observation duplication while retaining lineage.
misconceptions: Byte-identical pages have no separate audit relevance.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Distinguish URL alias, byte identity, admitted-record equality, replay, and observation duplication while retaining lineage.

competencies.statement: Use token and structure features, thresholds, counterexamples, false-merge sampling, and stakeholder consequences.
misconceptions: A similarity threshold proves duplicate identity objectively.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use token and structure features, thresholds, counterexamples, false-merge sampling, and stakeholder consequences.

competencies.statement: Classify content, template, metadata, accessibility, redirect, policy, parser, disappearance, and restoration changes.
misconceptions: Any digest difference means user-facing content changed.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify content, template, metadata, accessibility, redirect, policy, parser, disappearance, and restoration changes.

competencies.statement: Preserve observation history, supersession, tombstones, owner deletion, retention expiry, and report effects.
misconceptions: Overwriting a map entry provides enough change history.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Preserve observation history, supersession, tombstones, owner deletion, retention expiry, and report effects.

competencies.statement: Compare titles and descriptions with visible purpose, uniqueness, language, changed versions, and stakeholder task without universal length claims.
misconceptions: Fixed title length predicts search quality.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compare titles and descriptions with visible purpose, uniqueness, language, changed versions, and stakeholder task without universal length claims.

competencies.statement: Resolve canonical references and compare redirects, sitemap, internal links, content identity, reachability, and cycles.
misconceptions: Canonical link always forces duplicate consolidation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Resolve canonical references and compare redirects, sitemap, internal links, content identity, reachability, and cycles.

competencies.statement: Parse robots meta and X-Robots-Tag by product token, response, precedence, and scope while separating crawling from indexing.
misconceptions: Disallow and noindex mean the same thing.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Parse robots meta and X-Robots-Tag by product token, response, precedence, and scope while separating crawling from indexing.

competencies.statement: Validate codes, self links, reciprocity, canonical compatibility, reachability, and connected language alternatives.
misconceptions: Syntactically valid hreflang proves localization accuracy.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate codes, self links, reciprocity, canonical compatibility, reachability, and connected language alternatives.

competencies.statement: Decode bounded JSON-LD as untrusted values, validate supported shapes, preserve unknowns, and state eligibility non-claims.
misconceptions: json.Valid proves structured-data meaning and consumer eligibility.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Decode bounded JSON-LD as untrusted values, validate supported shapes, preserve unknowns, and state eligibility non-claims.

competencies.statement: Classify informative, decorative, functional, linked, complex, grouped, and text images using surrounding purpose and review uncertainty.
misconceptions: Every img requires non-empty alt text.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify informative, decorative, functional, linked, complex, grouped, and text images using surrounding purpose and review uncertainty.

competencies.statement: Audit document language, headings, landmarks, labels, instructions, table relationships, and duplicate identifiers as evidence, not templates.
misconceptions: Every page must have exactly one h1 and no skipped heading numbers.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Audit document language, headings, landmarks, labels, instructions, table relationships, and duplicate identifiers as evidence, not templates.

competencies.statement: Identify native semantics and attribute risks while noting accessible names, roles, values, and states may need browser computation.
misconceptions: Static HTML attributes determine every accessibility tree value.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Identify native semantics and attribute risks while noting accessible names, roles, values, and states may need browser computation.

competencies.statement: Flag keyboard, focus, motion, timing, status, target, contrast, and responsive risks and route them to controlled interaction review.
misconceptions: Go HTML parsing can prove keyboard access and visual contrast.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Flag keyboard, focus, motion, timing, status, target, contrast, and responsive risks and route them to controlled interaction review.

competencies.statement: Link findings to WCAG 2.2 criteria, affected users, page state, severity rationale, evidence, uncertainty, and human owner without conformance claims.
misconceptions: Zero static findings means the full site conforms to WCAG.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Link findings to WCAG 2.2 criteria, affected users, page state, severity rationale, evidence, uncertainty, and human owner without conformance claims.

competencies.statement: Inventory document, style, script, image, font, media, module, preload, and third-party references with source and scope.
misconceptions: All page resources are visible as simple src attributes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Inventory document, style, script, image, font, media, module, preload, and third-party references with source and scope.

competencies.statement: Separate wire, decoded, retained, intrinsic-media, rendered, and duplicate-transfer sizes with missing evidence visible.
misconceptions: Content-Length equals browser memory and rendered cost.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate wire, decoded, retained, intrinsic-media, rendered, and duplicate-transfer sizes with missing evidence visible.

competencies.statement: Report cache fields, validators, variation, redirects, compression, and cold or warm assumptions without simulating browser cache blindly.
misconceptions: Long max-age alone proves efficient delivery.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Report cache fields, validators, variation, redirects, compression, and cold or warm assumptions without simulating browser cache blindly.

competencies.statement: Set page-class count, byte, third-party, image, font, script, and uncertainty budgets with owners and exceptions.
misconceptions: One universal page-weight budget fits every public service.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Set page-class count, byte, third-party, image, font, script, and uncertainty budgets with owners and exceptions.

competencies.statement: Separate static resource inventory, controlled browser lab metrics, field telemetry, accessibility effects, and production claims.
misconceptions: net/http duration measures complete user-perceived performance.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate static resource inventory, controlled browser lab metrics, field telemetry, accessibility effects, and production claims.

competencies.statement: Require evidence that static retrieval cannot meet an authorized stakeholder need before admitting browser rendering.
misconceptions: JavaScript source means the page must be rendered.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require evidence that static retrieval cannot meet an authorized stakeholder need before admitting browser rendering.

competencies.statement: Define typed request, origin policy, viewport, actions, readiness, budgets, response, errors, trace, and cancellation for a separate controlled service.
misconceptions: Executing a browser CLI command is a sufficient integration contract.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define typed request, origin policy, viewport, actions, readiness, budgets, response, errors, trace, and cancellation for a separate controlled service.

competencies.statement: Apply authorization, SSRF, resource type, download, WebSocket, worker, and byte rules to every browser-initiated request.
misconceptions: Safe top-level URL validation controls all browser traffic.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Apply authorization, SSRF, resource type, download, WebSocket, worker, and byte rules to every browser-initiated request.

competencies.statement: Validate returned DOM, findings, screenshots, console events, digests, versions, and completeness as untrusted external data.
misconceptions: Output from an internal browser service is trusted Go data.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate returned DOM, findings, screenshots, console events, digests, versions, and completeness as untrusted external data.

competencies.statement: Require context isolation, closure, timeout, crash, leak, queue, version, and capacity evidence from the service without claiming it from Go models.
misconceptions: Closing the RPC response proves browser contexts and processes closed.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require context isolation, closure, timeout, crash, leak, queue, version, and capacity evidence from the service without claiming it from Go models.

competencies.statement: Require explicit owner, account, role, purpose, paths, time, data, environment, and revocation authorization for sessions.
misconceptions: Possessing valid credentials permits every accessible action.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require explicit owner, account, role, purpose, paths, time, data, environment, and revocation authorization for sessions.

competencies.statement: Acquire, scope, redact, rotate, destroy, and isolate secrets, cookies, CSRF material, caches, checkpoints, and reports per run and account.
misconceptions: Environment variables and CookieJar automatically protect secrets.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Acquire, scope, redact, rotate, destroy, and isolate secrets, cookies, CSRF material, caches, checkpoints, and reports per run and account.

competencies.statement: Allow safe retrieval only, block state-changing forms, logout and destructive routes, and test unexpected GET side effects.
misconceptions: GET requests can never mutate server state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Allow safe retrieval only, block state-changing forms, logout and destructive routes, and test unexpected GET side effects.

competencies.statement: Use safe text sinks, context encoding, reviewed sanitization, CSV formula defense, path confinement, and structured control-safe logs.
misconceptions: html.EscapeString makes data safe in HTML, CSV, filenames, and logs.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use safe text sinks, context encoding, reviewed sanitization, CSV formula defense, path confinement, and structured control-safe logs.

competencies.statement: Minimize, classify, encrypt where required, restrict, expire, delete, and audit sensitive values across all derivatives.
misconceptions: Redacting final reports eliminates privacy risk from crawl state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Minimize, classify, encrypt where required, restrict, expire, delete, and audit sensitive values across all derivatives.

competencies.statement: Version record envelopes, ordering, missingness, error rows, provenance, encoding, newline, and digest manifests for streaming JSON.
misconceptions: Encoder output is inherently deterministic and self-documenting.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Version record envelopes, ordering, missingness, error rows, provenance, encoding, newline, and digest manifests for streaming JSON.

competencies.statement: Define headers, ordering, delimiter, quoting, newline, Unicode, nulls, formula defense, row limits, and round-trip tests with encoding/csv.
misconceptions: CSV quoting prevents spreadsheet formulas and dialect ambiguity.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define headers, ordering, delimiter, quoting, newline, Unicode, nulls, formula defense, row limits, and round-trip tests with encoding/csv.

competencies.statement: Sort every externally visible map-derived set by stable typed keys and separate semantic order from serialization order.
misconceptions: Go map iteration order is stable within one binary.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Sort every externally visible map-derived set by stable typed keys and separate semantic order from serialization order.

competencies.statement: Create landmarks, headings, summaries, paged or filtered tables, keyboard controls, focus, status, reflow, print, and non-color severity.
misconceptions: Using table elements guarantees accessible large reports.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Create landmarks, headings, summaries, paged or filtered tables, keyboard controls, focus, status, reflow, print, and non-color severity.

competencies.statement: Link finding evidence, owner, severity rationale, status, exception expiry, correction, retest, changed page, and stakeholder outcome.
misconceptions: Removing a finding row is enough remediation history.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Link finding evidence, owner, severity rationale, status, exception expiry, correction, retest, changed page, and stakeholder outcome.

competencies.statement: Build original accepted, malformed, adversarial, Unicode, boundary, duplicate, inaccessible, privacy-sensitive, and changed fixtures with provenance.
misconceptions: One representative page covers crawler behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Build original accepted, malformed, adversarial, Unicode, boundary, duplicate, inaccessible, privacy-sensitive, and changed fixtures with provenance.

competencies.statement: Use custom RoundTrippers for request, redirect, body, cancellation, cleanup, and deterministic address decisions without network.
misconceptions: RoundTripper tests prove kernel DNS and socket behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use custom RoundTrippers for request, redirect, body, cancellation, cleanup, and deterministic address decisions without network.

competencies.statement: Use loopback HTTP and TLS servers for redirects, truncation, compression, encoding, slow headers and bodies, disconnects, retries, and shutdown.
misconceptions: httptest exactly reproduces internet and production proxy behavior.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use loopback HTTP and TLS servers for redirects, truncation, compression, encoding, slow headers and bodies, disconnects, retries, and shutdown.

competencies.statement: Fuzz URL, robots, XML, HTML, extraction, checkpoints, and reports with bounded oracles and run race tests under adversarial schedules.
misconceptions: No crash is a sufficient fuzz oracle and no race proves correctness.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Fuzz URL, robots, XML, HTML, extraction, checkpoints, and reports with bounded oracles and run race tests under adversarial schedules.

competencies.statement: Seed defects in scope, robots, byte limits, visited reservation, channel closure, CSV defense, and recovery and require tests to fail.
misconceptions: High coverage proves harmful mutations are detected.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Seed defects in scope, robots, byte limits, visited reservation, channel closure, CSV defense, and recovery and require tests to fail.

competencies.statement: Correlate run, policy, URL key, attempt, response, parser, frontier, goroutine, report, and recovery while redacting content and bounding labels.
misconceptions: Logging every raw URL makes operations evidence complete.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Correlate run, policy, URL key, attempt, response, parser, frontier, goroutine, report, and recovery while redacting content and bounding labels.

competencies.statement: Measure CPU, heap, allocations, goroutines, open files, sockets, queue age, bytes, throughput, and origin fairness under representative fixtures.
misconceptions: More goroutines always improve crawl throughput.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Measure CPU, heap, allocations, goroutines, open files, sockets, queue age, bytes, throughput, and origin fairness under representative fixtures.

competencies.statement: Use one schedule owner, overlap lock, missed-run policy, configuration and artifact identity, owner pause, signal handling, and clean shutdown.
misconceptions: cron plus a binary is a durable non-overlapping service.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use one schedule owner, overlap lock, missed-run policy, configuration and artifact identity, owner pause, signal handling, and clean shutdown.

competencies.statement: Bind source, modules, build settings, binary or image, config schema, policy, platform, and scan evidence; promote without rebuild.
misconceptions: Rebuilding the same commit creates the same approved binary.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bind source, modules, build settings, binary or image, config schema, policy, platform, and scan evidence; promote without rebuild.

competencies.statement: Set RPO, RTO, retention, encrypted backup, isolated restore, offline reconciliation, secret rotation, and safe-resume evidence for each data class.
misconceptions: A successful copy command proves recoverable crawler state.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Set RPO, RTO, retention, encrypted backup, isolated restore, offline reconciliation, secret rotation, and safe-resume evidence for each data class.

competencies.statement: Require clean source-to-binary, module, unit, fuzz, race, mutation, loopback, accessibility, security, capacity, deployment, restore, and rollback gates.
misconceptions: go test and go vet are sufficient release gates.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require clean source-to-binary, module, unit, fuzz, race, mutation, loopback, accessibility, security, capacity, deployment, restore, and rollback gates.

competencies.statement: Trace unfamiliar authorized seed through robots, scope, request, bytes, tree, record, graph, report, shutdown, checkpoint, and restored state with exact counts.
misconceptions: One expected output file proves end-to-end correctness.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Trace unfamiliar authorized seed through robots, scope, request, bytes, tree, record, graph, report, shutdown, checkpoint, and restored state with exact counts.

competencies.statement: Rehearse owner revoke, runaway frontier, private redirect, credential leak, parser drift, inaccessible report, goroutine leak, corrupt checkpoint, and unsafe output.
misconceptions: Process restart and rollback resolve every crawler incident.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Rehearse owner revoke, runaway frontier, private redirect, credential leak, parser drift, inaccessible report, goroutine leak, corrupt checkpoint, and unsafe output.

competencies.statement: Stop effects first, preserve evidence, revoke authority, restore known artifact and state, validate offline, resume narrowly, and document corrections.
misconceptions: Deploying prior binary immediately restores safe operation.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Stop effects first, preserve evidence, revoke authority, restore known artifact and state, validate offline, resume narrowly, and document corrections.

competencies.statement: State non-claims, close critical findings, assign accepted risks owners and expiries, and defend evidence before owner, accessibility, privacy, security, operations, and legal-review stakeholders.
misconceptions: Passing the planned demo eliminates residual risk.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: State non-claims, close critical findings, assign accepted risks owners and expiries, and defend evidence before owner, accessibility, privacy, security, operations, and legal-review stakeholders.

credential.title: Build and Ship an Authorized Web Crawler and Accessible Site Auditor in Go 1.26 Certificate
